# JewSA — Jewish-American Pride Merch
# https://jewsa.com
# Built by The Voice of Cash Team | Network: The Voice of Cash

## About
JewSA is a Jewish-American pride merch brand — gear for the tribe that built America and never stopped being funny about it. The brand celebrates Jewish-American identity with humor, quality, and respect for the culture.

## Pages

### Core
- / — Homepage with shop, culture stats, glossary, calendar, and email capture
- /cart — Shopping cart
- /holidays — All 8 major Jewish holidays
- /calendar — Visual Jewish holiday calendar (lunisolar dates)
- /gifts — Gift guides for every Jewish occasion
- /daily-verse — Daily curated Jewish wisdom verse
- /culture — Jewish-American culture hub
- /blog — Blog with articles on Jewish culture, humor, history, and style
- /advertise — Advertising information

### Holiday Pages
- /holidays/rosh-hashanah — Rosh Hashanah (Jewish New Year)
- /holidays/yom-kippur — Yom Kippur (Day of Atonement)
- /holidays/sukkot — Sukkot (Festival of Tabernacles)
- /holidays/hanukkah — Hanukkah (Festival of Lights)
- /holidays/purim — Purim (Feast of Lots)
- /holidays/passover — Passover / Pesach (Festival of Freedom)
- /holidays/shavuot — Shavuot (Festival of Weeks)
- /holidays/tu-bishvat — Tu B'Shvat (New Year of Trees)

### Gift Guides
- /gifts/hanukkah — Hanukkah Gift Guide
- /gifts/passover — Passover Gift Guide
- /gifts/bar-mitzvah — Bar Mitzvah Gift Guide
- /gifts/bat-mitzvah — Bat Mitzvah Gift Guide
- /gifts/rosh-hashanah — Rosh Hashanah Gift Guide
- /gifts/wedding — Jewish Wedding Gift Guide
- /gifts/shabbat — Shabbat Gift Guide
- /gifts/just-because — Just Because Gift Guide

### Culture Articles
- /culture/history-of-jews-in-america — The History of Jews in America (1654 to present)
- /culture/famous-jewish-americans — Famous Jewish Americans (Einstein, RBG, Spielberg, Seinfeld, Koufax, Dylan, Streisand, Salk)
- /culture/jewish-humor-explained — Jewish Humor Explained (self-deprecation, Borscht Belt, key comedians)
- /culture/guide-to-your-jewish-neighbor — A Non-Jewish Person's Guide to Your Jewish Neighbor
- /culture/jewish-food-in-america — Jewish Food in America (bagels, delis, challah, matzo ball soup, brisket)

### Blog Posts
- /blog/jewish-guilt-superpower — Why Jewish Guilt Is Actually a Superpower
- /blog/best-jewish-delis-america — The Best Jewish Delis in America Right Now
- /blog/what-non-jews-get-wrong-passover — What Non-Jews Always Get Wrong About Passover
- /blog/jews-american-fashion-history — A Brief History of Jews in American Fashion
- /blog/hamsa-most-underrated-jewelry-symbol — Why the Hamsa Is the Most Underrated Symbol in Jewelry
- /blog/funniest-jewish-expressions-explained — The Funniest Jewish Expressions and What They Actually Mean
- /blog/jewish-american-comedy-shaped-culture — How Jewish-American Comedy Shaped Modern Culture
- /blog/hanukkah-vs-christmas-guide-for-gentiles — Hanukkah vs Christmas: A Guide for Confused Gentiles
- /blog/jewish-american-kitchen-dishes — The Jewish-American Kitchen: Dishes That Tell Our Story
- /blog/why-every-jew-needs-a-good-tallit — Why Every Jew Needs a Good Tallit
- /blog/bar-bat-mitzvah-gifts-that-make-sense — Bar and Bat Mitzvah Gifts That Actually Make Sense
- /blog/rise-of-jewish-pride-merch — The Rise of Jewish Pride Merch
- /blog/passover-survival-guide-whole-family — The Ultimate Passover Survival Guide for the Whole Family
- /blog/jewish-delis-changed-america-state-by-state — Jewish Delis That Changed America: A State-by-State Tour
- /blog/jewish-kids-summer-camp-stories — Why Every Jewish Kid Has the Same Summer Camp Stories

## Products
- JewSA Basic Tee — $25
- Old School Bucket Hat — $25

## Technical
- Framework: Next.js 15 (App Router)
- Hosting: Vercel
- Payments: Stripe
- Fonts: Bebas Neue (headings), DM Sans (body)
- Colors: Navy #0B1F3A, Gold #C9A84C, Red #B22234, White #F5F0E8

## Contact
Email: thevoiceofcash@gmail.com
